transcript.text:
[It's gotten warmer these days]
[Red kimchi broth]
[And rice?!]
[Why rice?]
[Hello, I'm Kimchi Rice Soup]
[An awkward combination...]
[This is it!]
[Noodles too~]
[And other sides to go with them]
You're not eating all of that, right?
[Can't be...]
[Go away Summer heat!]
[Refreshing]
[Let's head over to chase away the heat]
[We invite you here]
Hello everyone

I'm here near downtown
It's Summer now, so I've been craving some cold kimchi noodles
And found cold kimchi rice soup
[In the busy streets of downtown...]
[Inside the alley]
I'm curious Kimchi rice soup?
I think it's going to be weird...
Rice with cold soup?
It says here
"At the end of the alley"
This way?
[Follow me!]
[Another sign to show the way]
[Keep going without stopping]
It's a traditional home in the alley
It looks like a secret place

Hello
[Perfect traditional interior]
Look at the ceiling
[You can feel its age]
The menu
[A lot of items on the menu]
Roll mandu and North Korean mandu? (dumplings)
Roll doesn't have a cover
The other has it
Same fillings?
[That's right]
Kimchi rice soup...
It was popular in North Korea first
The owner added the noodles to the menu because the South Koreans love noodles
So It's cold kimchi soup with rice?
[That's right]

[Terror and shock]
Difference between bossam and suyuk?
Bossam is pork Suyuk is beef
-Which one's better? -Suyuk
Do 1 suyuk and 1 mandu soup
[Huh?]
No?
I eat a lot So I want more
1 North Korean mandu soup,
1 mandu roll soup,
1 plate of mandu roll,
1 cold kimchi rice soup,
1 cold kimchi noodle soup,
1 assorted pancakes,
1 suyuk, please
I have to help you eat that We have more workers here to help you

[Believe it or not, it's for 1 person...]
[Hungry]
Now I know who you are without the mask
You didn't know until now?
[That's why she reacted like this]
You can eat everything here
I've been coming for over 20 years
It's the best
[That's right]
Kimchi rice soup and Tzuyang are on the same level
[That's a compliment!]
I've been coming here since I was in my 30's
[Let's start with the mandu]
[North Korean mandu if it's covered]
[No covers=roll]
[Cold rice and cole noodles]

[Cold kimchi soup rice & noodles]
[Assorted Korean-style Pancakes]
[This fish pancake-looking pieces...]
[Will be revealed soon!]
[All ready to go]
[Open the lid]
[Soft beef slices]
[Today's meal is served!]
Thank you Wow, looks great
[Coming out 1 by 1]
So greedy
[Such a greedy person]
Looks delicious
Let's try the kimchi This is an important ingredient
It's delicious
[Now even more excited to try]

It really has rice
Cold soup with rice...
Why?
[Not common, but still looks good]
It might taste good
It can be weird too...
[Finally her first bite!]
[2nd bite without a word...]
I thought cold kimchi soup with rice would be weird
But it's not
This is perfect for a hot day
It's good
This isn't weird at all
Kimchi is tasty
The broth has a hint of sesame oil
It goes really well with rice

But one other thing There are mugworts and I can't eat them
The smell... I wonder if I can do it, let's try
Some wasabi to get the taste off
[Hulk mode]
[Don't put too much wasabi]
It seems okay
But the meat has mugwort smell on them
I need to take them out before it gets worse
[Big frown]
The smell makes me want to throw up It's something I dislike the most
So I'll take them out
[Keeps making excuses]
[Finished]
Let's try the mandu roll
I can taste the black peppers
I never get sick of these types of mandu

The fillings are so soft
Now for the soup
North Korean style
This is their most popular item
Tasty
Some soy sauce over it
Let's try the mandu
Same fillings
The cover is thin
And very soft Everything is soft
Some pancakes too
North Korean foods are not too strong in flavors overall
Very light, so it makes you want to eat a lot
Cold kimchi noodles This is why I came here today
Looks good The noodles are yellow
Check out the portions

Mix it up
The flavors from the sesame oil
Wrap it with kimchi
It's a cold kimchi rice soup if you put rice in here
You can enjoy both if you just order this And order a side of cold rice
Amazing
I'm going to finish it
I will save it for later
Mandu roll soup
With soy sauce
I think this is meat
Meat, mung bean, and chili pepper pancakes in the assorted plate
But the chili peppers... Will I be okay?
[Doesn't like green]
[Grabs one carefully...]
Spicy

Better than expected
1 more bite
Better than I thought
It's good
[Again]
The chili pepper is soggy because it's cooked
So it's like a cooked paprika Not bad
Let's cut this
They really packed this thing
It's very soft
It melts like tofu
I've never had pork meat pancakes before
I've had lots of the beef ones But not as pork
It's good
Tender
Split this in half

Look at this
[Gone in 5 seconds]
Is this possible in 1 bite? As a human?
[Not human]
[The mandu is gone...?]
It just melted in my mouth and disappeared
Did you see that?
The pancakes make me want some rice wine
[Drink some coke instead]
Kimchi on top of pork pancake
[1 more time]
[Kimchi with meat slices too]
This too?
Mung bean pancake with kimchi too
Now it's time for me to eat everything
[Then what was it that you were doing before...?]

1 piece if really packed with fillings
The inside is cool because
If it's packed, it's supposed to be somewhat dry
But these are really packed and still very soft
[What is she looking at?]
They're selling kimchi?
Do I need to buy some?
Are they selling this kimchi?
This kimchi would taste so good with seaweed soup
Mandu soup, seaweed soup, rice cake soup
Where does all of that go into that small body?
Just let me know if you want hot soup
Can you re-heat this one, please?
[That's right]
Thankfully, she will heat the soup again
[Eating the pancakes while she waits]

[What are you thinking now?]
Come to think of it, our PD really likes the green chili pepper pancakes
PD: I do?
[Lol]
I remember you enjoying it
[Fine, I like it then]
It's not because I don't want it It's really good
But he likes these so much
I'll have to give him some
[Actress of the year]
Well, I didn't know it came with chili pepper pancakes
I will get you something delicious later
You didn't give me a single pork pancake
I will buy you 1 after this
No, really Where does all of that going to?
In my belly

You don't even have a belly
[Warmed up mandu soup]
Hot soup is the best
Rice first or the noodles first?
Rice first
[I like chili pepper pancakes]
It's good, right?
[I like chili pepper pancakes]
[PD's camera shots while he eats the chili pepper pancakes...]
The cold kimchi soup will be popular in the Summer, while the hot mandu soup is popular in the Winter
They have both, so it's nice
[Someone who's into the cold kimchi soup]
[And someone who's into the chili pepper pancakes]
Did you finish it all?
[Clean]
It was a lot though

[The PD actually loves chili pepper pancakes then?]
[Assorted pancakes cleared]
Some noodles too
[Still looking very refreshing...]
I finished the noodles
But not the soup
Mandu here
Almost forgot
[Cleared everything]
Need to clap for that
[Eating more?]
[Someone please stop her...]
Thanks everyone
-Did you enjoy your meal? -Yes, very much
Thank you
Which one did you like more? From the mandu soups

[Dilemma]
The North Korean Style
[That's right]
That's why it's our main dish
Thank you! [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
